---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem this solves

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.
e.g. "I find it hard to..." or "There's no way to..."

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Include any UI sketches, API designs, or schema changes if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Any other context, links, or examples that would help evaluate the request.
